topIngredients.name: Rice Extract (Oryza Sativa, 68%)
topIngredients.benefit: High-concentration brightening ingredient with antioxidant properties

topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Fades hyperpigmentation and evens overall skin tone

topIngredients.name: Adenosine
topIngredients.benefit: Anti-aging ingredient that supports overnight skin repair

verdict: COSRX Rice Overnight Mask delivers an impressive 68% rice extract concentration for a budget sleeping mask. The niacinamide and adenosine combination makes it one of the most active overnight treatments at this price.
